Item.Name: LocalizableStrings.MultipleQueueItemsFoundError.Value
Item.Value: יותר מרכיב אחד מחובר לתהליך. מזהה תהליך: {0}

Item.Name: LocalizableStrings.PostponeQueueItemError.Value
Item.Value: לא ניתן לסדר מחדש את הפריט בתור. הודעת שגיאה: {0}

Item.Name: LocalizableStrings.QueueItemIsEmptyError.Value
Item.Value: הדף אינו מחובר אל רכיב תור שולחן העבודה של הסוכן. הפעולה בוטלה.

Item.Name: LocalizableStrings.QueueItemPostponeFailedMessage.Value
Item.Value: לא ניתן לסדר מחדש פריט בתור

Item.Name: LocalizableStrings.ServiceItemTipMessageByLic.Value
Item.Value: Services determine case categories as well as default response and resolution deadlines. The scope of services is determined by the customer’s service level agreement (SLA). Use the "Services" and "Service agreements" sections to configure available services

Item.Name: LocalizableStrings.ServiceItemTipMessage.Value
Item.Value: Services determine case categories as well as default response and resolution deadlines. The scope of services is determined by the customer’s service level agreement (SLA). Use the "Services" and "Service agreements" sections to configure available services

Item.Name: LocalizableStrings.ServicePactTipMessage.Value
Item.Value: Service level agreements (SLA) determine the scope of services provided to different types of customers, as well as conditions for rendering subcontracted and internal services. Use the "Service agreements" section to create and modify service agreements

Item.Name: LocalizableStrings.SetCaseContactMessage.Value
Item.Value: האם לציין את {0} כאיש קשר במקרה?
